## Test Coverage Targets

- **Line Coverage**: 80% minimum
- **Branch Coverage**: 90% for critical paths
- **Functional Coverage**: 100% acceptance criteria
- **Risk Coverage**: 100% high-risk scenarios

- [ ] All test design techniques identified and documented
- [ ] Complete ISO 25010 quality characteristics assessment

- [ ] Risk assessment completed with mitigation strategies
- [ ] Test environment and tools identified
